de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class SymbolicLayoutWriter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.AbstractWriter
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutWriter

  • public class SymbolicLayoutWriter
extends AbstractWriter
    Allows to persistent selected properties of ISymbolicLayouts as XML file. Such files can be read via a SymbolicLayoutReader instance.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
    See Also:
    SymbolicLayoutReader

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static String ATTRIBUTE_ARRAY_INDEX
      Attribute name to store ISymbolicValue.getArrayIndexString() and ISymbolicAssociation.getArrayIndexString().
      static String ATTRIBUTE_CONDITION
      Attribute name to store ISymbolicValue.getConditionString() and ISymbolicAssociation.getConditionString().
      static String ATTRIBUTE_IS_ARRAY_INDEX
      Attribute name to store ISymbolicValue.isArrayIndex() and ISymbolicAssociation.getArrayIndexString().
      static String ATTRIBUTE_NAME
      Attribute name to store ISymbolicObject.getNameString().
      static String ATTRIBUTE_PROGRAM_VARIABLE
      Attribute name to store ISymbolicValue.getProgramVariableString() and ISymbolicAssociation.getProgramVariableString().
      static String ATTRIBUTE_REPRESENTATIVE
      Attribute name to store ISymbolicEquivalenceClass.getRepresentativeString().
      static String ATTRIBUTE_TARGET
      Attribute name to store ISymbolicAssociation.getTarget().
      static String ATTRIBUTE_TERM
      Attribute name to store an entry of ISymbolicEquivalenceClass.getTermStrings()
      static String ATTRIBUTE_TYPE
      Attribute name to store ISymbolicValue.getTypeString() and ISymbolicObject.getTypeString().
      static String ATTRIBUTE_VALUE
      Attribute name to store ISymbolicValue.getValueString().
      static String TAG_ASSOCIATION
      Tag name to store ISymbolicAssociations.
      static String TAG_EQUIVALENCE_CLASS
      Tag name to store ISymbolicEquivalenceClasss.
      static String TAG_MODEL
      Tag name to store ISymbolicLayouts.
      static String TAG_OBJECT
      Tag name to store ISymbolicObjects.
      static String TAG_STATE
      Tag name to store ISymbolicStates.
      static String TAG_TERM
      Tag name to store entries of ISymbolicEquivalenceClass.getTerms()s.
      static String TAG_VALUE
      Tag name to store ISymbolicValues.

        ATTRIBUTE_ENCODING, ATTRIBUTE_XML_ID, DEFAULT_ENCODING, LEADING_WHITE_SPACE_PER_LEVEL, NEW_LINE

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected void appendAssociation(int level, ISymbolicLayout model, ISymbolicAssociation association, StringBuffer sb)
      Appends the given ISymbolicAssociation with its children to the given StringBuffer.
      protected void appendEquivalenceClass(int level, ISymbolicEquivalenceClass ec, StringBuffer sb)
      Appends the given ISymbolicEquivalenceClass with its children to the given StringBuffer.
      protected void appendModel(int level, ISymbolicLayout model, StringBuffer sb)
      Appends the given ISymbolicLayout with its children to the given StringBuffer.
      protected void appendObject(int level, ISymbolicLayout model, ISymbolicObject object, StringBuffer sb)
      Appends the given ISymbolicObject with its children to the given StringBuffer.
      protected void appendState(int level, ISymbolicLayout model, ISymbolicState state, StringBuffer sb)
      Appends the given ISymbolicState with its children to the given StringBuffer.
      protected void appendValue(int level, ISymbolicValue value, StringBuffer sb)
      Appends the given ISymbolicValue with its children to the given StringBuffer.
      protected String computeObjectId(ISymbolicLayout model, ISymbolicObject object)
      Computes a unique ID for the given object in the given model.
      String toXML(ISymbolicLayout model, String encoding)
      Converts the given ISymbolicLayout into XML.
      void write(ISymbolicLayout model, String encoding, File file)
      Writes the given ISymbolicLayout as XML file.
      void write(ISymbolicLayout model, String encoding, OutputStream out)
      Writes the given ISymbolicLayout into the OutputStream.

    • Constructor Detail

      • SymbolicLayoutWriter

        public SymbolicLayoutWriter()

    • Method Detail

      • write

        public void write(ISymbolicLayout model,
         String encoding,
         File file)
           throws IOException
        Writes the given ISymbolicLayout as XML file.
        Parameters:
        model - The ISymbolicLayout to save.
        encoding - The encoding to use.
        file - The File to save to.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • write

        public void write(ISymbolicLayout model,
         String encoding,
         OutputStream out)
           throws IOException
        Writes the given ISymbolicLayout into the OutputStream.
        Parameters:
        node - The ISymbolicLayout to save.
        encoding - The encoding to use.
        out - The OutputStream to save to. The OutputStream will be closed by this method.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • toXML

        public String toXML(ISymbolicLayout model,
           String encoding)
        Converts the given ISymbolicLayout into XML.
        Parameters:
        node - The ISymbolicLayout to convert.
        encoding - The encoding to use.
        Returns:
        The created XML content.

      • appendModel

        protected void appendModel(int level,
               ISymbolicLayout model,
               StringBuffer sb)
        Appends the given ISymbolicLayout with its children to the given StringBuffer.
        Parameters:
        level - The level to use.
        model - The ISymbolicLayout to append.
        sb - The StringBuffer to append to.

      • appendEquivalenceClass

        protected void appendEquivalenceClass(int level,
                          ISymbolicEquivalenceClass ec,
                          StringBuffer sb)
        Appends the given ISymbolicEquivalenceClass with its children to the given StringBuffer.
        Parameters:
        level - The level to use.
        ec - The ISymbolicEquivalenceClass to append.
        sb - The StringBuffer to append to.

      • appendState

        protected void appendState(int level,
               ISymbolicLayout model,
               ISymbolicState state,
               StringBuffer sb)
        Appends the given ISymbolicState with its children to the given StringBuffer.
        Parameters:
        level - The level to use.
        model - The ISymbolicLayout which provides all objects.
        state - The ISymbolicState to append.
        sb - The StringBuffer to append to.

      • appendObject

        protected void appendObject(int level,
                ISymbolicLayout model,
                ISymbolicObject object,
                StringBuffer sb)
        Appends the given ISymbolicObject with its children to the given StringBuffer.
        Parameters:
        level - The level to use.
        model - The ISymbolicLayout which provides all objects.
        object - The ISymbolicObject to append.
        sb - The StringBuffer to append to.

      • appendValue

        protected void appendValue(int level,
               ISymbolicValue value,
               StringBuffer sb)
        Appends the given ISymbolicValue with its children to the given StringBuffer.
        Parameters:
        level - The level to use.
        value - The ISymbolicValue to append.
        sb - The StringBuffer to append to.

      • appendAssociation

        protected void appendAssociation(int level,
                     ISymbolicLayout model,
                     ISymbolicAssociation association,
                     StringBuffer sb)
        Appends the given ISymbolicAssociation with its children to the given StringBuffer.
        Parameters:
        level - The level to use.
        model - The ISymbolicLayout which provides all objects.
        association - The ISymbolicAssociation to append.
        sb - The StringBuffer to append to.

      • computeObjectId

        protected String computeObjectId(ISymbolicLayout model,
                     ISymbolicObject object)
        Computes a unique ID for the given object in the given model.
        Parameters:
        model - The ISymbolicLayout which provides all objects.
        object - The ISymbolicObject to compute its unique ID.
        Returns:
        The unique ID.
